last_completed_round.direction_name: Restore The Best Measured PTX Grouping Window On The Accepted Surface
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 39 replayed the bounded PTX wait/commit-window reopen and regressed from 24.17151993 ms to 24.20684814 ms even though the headline scheduler counters stayed broadly flat. That is enough negative evidence to stop spending another immediate round on the same micro-retime family. The highest-value move for round 40 is therefore to restore the exact accepted `489574e` PTX surface again, re-anchor the search on the clean plateau, and only then decide whether the next post-checkpoint branch should reopen a different family or escalate back to a structural pivot.

notes: Build passed for round 41/100. Node A will measure the result next.
